eda_insights: Task: classification. 1460 rows, 38 numeric, 42 categorical features.

Parallel Evaluation: 7 models — decision_tree=0.9542 | random_forest=0.9500 | gradient_boosting=0.9466 | svm=0.9126 | logistic_regression=0.8551 | knn=0.8411 | xgboost=-999.0000
justification: Decision Tree ranked 1st out of 6 models with a composite score of 0.9542 (50% CV + 30% test + 20% stability). CV score: 0.9503 | Test score: 0.9486 | CV std dev: 0.0028 | Overfit gap: 0.0017. Highly stable across folds (std dev <= 0.03) — reliable on unseen data. Excellent generalisation — train and test scores are closely aligned. Optimal hyperparameters found via RandomizedSearchCV (5-fold): min_samples_split=20, min_samples_leaf=1, max_depth=8, ccp_alpha=0.01.
